home.heroTitle: Grow your vocabulary from real TOEIC/TOEFL passages.
home.heroBody: Read authentic English, tap any word or phrase to capture it, and progress from memorization to real sentence production — all in one loop.

auth.title: Welcome to en-word-book
auth.subtitle: Sign in to save your learning progress
auth.confirmEmail: We sent you a confirmation email. Open the link in the email to complete signup.
auth.genericError: Sign in failed. Please try again.
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
auth.shortPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters

read.title: Read
read.subtitle: Pick up vocabulary from authentic TOEIC/TOEFL-style passages.
read.tapHint: Tap any word or phrase to see its meaning and save it to your vocabulary.

reader.aiFailed: AI lookup failed. Please retry in a moment.
reader.rateLimited: Too many requests in a short time. Please wait a minute.

vocab.title: Vocabulary
vocab.subtitle: Words, idioms and phrases you have saved.
vocab.empty: No items yet. Tap a word or drag-select a phrase in a reading to add one.
vocab.confirmDeleteBody: Remove "{name}" from your vocabulary. Past review history will also be deleted.

review.title: Review
review.entrySubtitle: Go through your due cards one by one to cement memory.
review.allClearBody: No cards are due. Add new ones from readings or your vocab list.
review.sentencePlaceholder: e.g., She took a pragmatic approach to the problem.
review.gradeRateLimited: Too many grading requests. Please wait a minute.

actions.reviewAllClear: No cards are due right now.
actions.drillBody: {count} items have lapses you can practice.

recent.title: Recently saved
recent.subtitle: Items picked up from readings
recent.empty: Tap a word in a passage to add your first item.

drill.title: Weak-spot drill
drill.subtitle: Revisit items you have struggled with. Runs any time, regardless of SRS schedule.
drill.emptyBody: Items you marked Again or Hard in review will appear here.
drill.lapseSummary: {lapses} total lapses recorded across these items.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and learning preferences.
settings.uiLocaleDesc: Language of on-screen labels. Saving switches the page automatically.
settings.meaningLocaleDesc: How glosses are shown. Both shows Japanese and English together.
